name: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd.
summary: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd. manufactures and sells pressure die casting dies, jigs, fixtures, and components primarily for the two and three wheeler industry in India. It operates through two segments, Manufacturing and Investments. The company also engages in treasury operation business, which manages surplus funds invested by the company. Maharashtra Scooters Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is based in Pune, India. Maharashtra Scooters Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Bajaj Holdings & Investment Limited.
